subject: english
title: Tiếng Anh Ngôi Sao Hà Nội (đề trải nghiệm)
intro: Đề trải nghiệm môn Tiếng Anh vào lớp 6 — Trường THCS Ngôi Sao Hà Nội. 45 câu trắc nghiệm + 1 bài viết, kèm đáp án.
source: tak12.com — Đề trải nghiệm Ngôi Sao Hà Nội (kèm đáp án + giải thích)

passages.title: Marco's Birthday Party
passages.body:
Marco wanted a pool party for his birthday. He made a list of friends to invite, and his mom suggested six friends so she could watch them safely in the pool. Marco made six invitations and gave them to his friends at school. Max, Sam, Kai, Liam, and Felix were excited and said they would come. Marco gave the last invitation to Aidan. Aidan seemed happy, but he didn't take the invitation right away.
That evening, Marco's mom got a call from Aidan's mom. After the call, she explained, "Aidan really wants to come to your party. But he gets a little nervous."
"So what's wrong with him?" Marco asked.
"Aidan isn't a great swimmer," his mom said. "He's worried about swimming and afraid the other boys might tease him."
"Mom, I'd never tease Aidan," Marco replied. In the end, Mom and Marco decided that the kids swim only in the shallow end of the pool so that Aidan could enjoy the party without feeling nervous. The solution worked, and Marco's party was a success.

passages.title: A Letter to the Cafeteria Manager
passages.body:
From: Jane Smith
To: Mrs. Linda Brown - Cafeteria Manager

Dear Mrs. Brown,

My name is Jane Smith, and I am a student at Springfield High School. I am writing to talk about the quality of food in our school canteen. Right now, the canteen mostly sells fast food. These foods have a lot of sugar and calories so it can cause weight gain and other health problems.

I think it would be a good idea to offer more healthy options, like salads, fruits, and whole grain sandwiches. This would help improve students' health. I also think the canteen should sell less fast food. A healthy diet can help students focus and do better in school.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter.

Sincerely,
Jane Smith

passages.title: Solar Energy
passages.body:
Solar energy is a clean and renewable source of energy that comes from the sun. It has become one of the most popular renewable resources today because it is good for the environment. Solar energy is a large source of energy, and we can still use it even when the weather is cloudy or rainy. The amount of solar energy that reaches the Earth is about 10,000 times greater than the amount we use. Solar energy can be used to provide heat, light, electricity, and fuel for many different purposes, such as heating homes, powering cars, and charging devices. It is also used to help power factories, businesses, and even schools.
Solar panels collect sunlight and change it into electricity. The cost of installing solar panels has gone down a lot in the last few years, so more people can afford to use solar energy. People can use solar panels from 25 to 30 years. How long they last depends on the materials. Although different countries use different amounts of solar energy, they all try to use less non-renewable energy to protect the environment and help create a cleaner future for everyone.

questions.stem:
Choose the sentence that is CLOSEST in meaning to:
"Even though Mary was extremely tired, she attempted to run fast."

options.text: The attempt to run fast made Mary feel extremely tired.
Despite feeling extremely tired, Mary attempted to run fast.
Mary attempted to run as fast as possible but she was extremely tired.
Mary was extremely tired after trying to run fast.

questions.stem:
Choose the sentence that is CLOSEST in meaning to:
"How about going to the shopping center this weekend?"

options.text: Do they let us go to the shopping center this weekend?
Why don't we go to the shopping center this weekend?
Why are we going to the shopping center this weekend?
We must go to the shopping center this weekend.

questions.stem:

options.text: Hanoi suburban areas are as noisy as its urban districts.
Hanoi suburban areas are noisier than its urban districts.
Hanoi suburban areas are not as noisy as its urban districts.
Hanoi suburban areas are as quiet as its urban districts.

questions.stem: Writing task: Describe TWO dreams or goals you want to achieve in the future and how you plan to reach them. You should write about 100 words.
questions.modelAnswer: Sample answer: "One of my biggest dreams is to become a doctor. I want to help people stay healthy and save lives. To achieve this, I plan to study hard at school, especially in science subjects like biology and chemistry. I also hope to attend a good medical school and gain hands-on experience through internships. My second goal is to travel the world. I dream of visiting countries like Japan and Italy to learn about their cultures and history. To make this happen, I will save money by working part-time and plan my trips carefully to manage my budget. Both dreams seem difficult, but I can achieve them with effort." (~108 words). Yêu cầu: nêu rõ HAI ước mơ/mục tiêu + kế hoạch cụ thể để đạt được; khoảng 100 từ; bố cục rõ ràng, đúng ngữ pháp/chính tả.
